name: Creamy Broccoli Soup (Lane)
recipeIngredient: 1 large baking potato, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion to 1-1/2 cup and potato to 1-3/4 cup.
2. Prepare the broccoli by cutting off and reserving the dark green florets. With a small, sharp knife, peel the stems lengthwise to reach the tender, nonfibrous part inside. Discard the peelings and coarsely chop the tender parts of the stems. Set aside stems and florets.
3. Heat olive oil over medium-low heat in a large kettle.
4. Add onion and saute for 3 to 4 minutes or until soft.
5. Add garlic and saute 1 minute longer.
6. Stir in flour until it coats the onion mixture and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
7. Add water and bring to a boil over low heat.
8. Add potato, broccoli, salt, thyme, and white pepper; simmer covered for 35 minutes.
9. Add evaporated skim milk and lemon juice; simmer uncovered for 15 minutes longer.
10. Strain broth and vegetables.
11. Puree the vegetables in a food processor or blender; or use a hand-held immersion blender.
12. Recombine pureed vegetables and broth; stir well.
Makes 9-1/2 cups.
